title: Preparation of samples for determination of soluble N and C concentrations in soil labile pools using the robot.  With the methods aligned to allow isotope ratios of the different pools to be measured.
author: Hood-Nowotny, Rebecca
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This protocol deals with the preparation of soil samples to determine the concentrations and allows determination of isotopic ratios of inorganic N soluble organic N (SON) and dissolved organic carbon (DOC) to be measured using a low-cost robot.      
  The method is extensively used for large numbers of samples and therefore is particularly suited to field experiments etc.
steps_raw:
This protocol deals with the preparation of soil samples to determine the concentrations and allows determination of isotopic ratios of inorganic N soluble organic N (SON) and dissolved organic carbon (DOC) to be measured using a low-cost robot.
